agents.name: animation
agents.description: Generates storyboards, selects animation libraries, and coordinates video rendering sub-agents.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: generate-storyboard
skills.description: Generate a 4-panel animation storyboard from a description

skills.name: select-library
skills.description: Recommend the best animation library for a target platform

subAgents.name: remotion
subAgents.description: React-based video rendering with Remotion: compositions, sequences, audio, transitions, overlays, Lambda deploy

subAgents.name: lottie
subAgents.description: Lottie/Bodymovin vector animation generation, optimization, and React integration

agents.name: lottie
agents.description: Lottie animation sub-agent — generates, optimizes, and renders Lottie/Bodymovin JSON animations. Inherits from animation parent.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: generate-lottie
skills.description: Generates a Lottie animation JSON spec from a text description

parameters.description: string — what the animation should depict

skills.name: optimize-lottie
skills.description: Optimizes a Lottie JSON file — removes unused layers, minifies, reduces keyframes

skills.name: lottie-react-guide
skills.description: Generates React code to embed a Lottie animation using lottie-react or lottie-web

agents.name: remotion
agents.description: Remotion sub-agent — programmatic React video rendering. Creates compositions, sequences clips, syncs audio, applies transitions/overlays, and renders MP4 videos. Inherits from animation parent.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: render-video
skills.description: Generates a Remotion composition and renders it as MP4/WebM/GIF via npx remotion render

skills.name: create-composition
skills.description: Generates a Remotion React composition component with useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, and interpolate

parameters.description: string — what the animation should do visually

skills.name: sequence-clips
skills.description: Generates a Remotion <Sequence> chain to arrange clips in order with offsets

parameters.clips: array — [{ name: string, from: number, durationInFrames: number }]

skills.name: audio-sync
skills.description: Generates Remotion code to sync audio tracks with visual frames

parameters.audioSrc: string — audio file path or URL

skills.name: transitions
skills.description: Generates Remotion transition effects: fade, slide, wipe, scale, flip

skills.name: overlays
skills.description: Generates Remotion overlay layers: text captions, watermarks, lower-thirds, progress bars

skills.name: deploy-video
skills.description: Generates deployment config for Remotion Lambda — render in cloud at scale

agents.name: budget
agents.description: Tracks LLM usage costs, enforces budget limits, and provides cost optimization recommendations.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: set-budget
skills.description: Set a budget limit for a project

skills.name: get-status
skills.description: Get budget status for a project

subAgents.name: llm-budget
subAgents.description: LLM cost estimation, usage tracking, optimization, and forecasting

subAgents.name: personal-budget
subAgents.description: Personal expense tracking, savings goals, and monthly reporting

agents.name: llm-budget
agents.description: LLM cost tracking sub-agent — estimates costs per model/provider, tracks cumulative usage, optimizes spend patterns, and forecasts future costs. Inherits budget thresholds from parent budget agent.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: estimate-cost
skills.description: Estimates the cost of an LLM call based on model, token count, and provider pricing

skills.name: track-usage
skills.description: Tracks cumulative token usage and cost for a project or agent over time

skills.name: optimize-costs
skills.description: Analyzes usage patterns and suggests cost optimizations (model changes, prompt shortening, caching)

skills.name: forecast
skills.description: Projects future costs based on historical usage trends

agents.name: personal-budget
agents.description: Personal finance tracking sub-agent — log expenses, set savings goals, generate monthly reports, and categorize spending. Inherits budget thresholds from parent budget agent.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: track-expense
skills.description: Log a personal expense with category, amount, and date

parameters.date: string — ISO date, defaults to today

skills.name: set-savings-goal
skills.description: Set a personal savings goal with target amount and deadline

skills.name: monthly-report
skills.description: Generate a monthly spending report with category breakdown

skills.name: categorize-spending
skills.description: Use LLM to auto-categorize uncategorized expenses

agents.name: finance
agents.description: Central finance agent — tracks subscription payments, monitors billing status, and coordinates payment verification across services like Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: list-subscriptions
skills.description: List all tracked subscriptions with their payment status

skills.name: record-payment
skills.description: Record a payment for a subscription service

skills.name: subscription-status
skills.description: Get payment status for a specific subscription

subAgents.name: subscription-checker
subAgents.description: Checks Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva subscriptions — verifies payments are completed and reports status to the finance agent

agents.name: subscription-checker
agents.description: Subscription checking sub-agent — verifies that recurring payments for Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva are completed. Communicates with the parent finance agent to record and track payment status.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: check-google-mail
skills.description: Check if Google Mail (Google Workspace) subscription payment is completed

parameters.expectedAmount: number — expected payment amount in USD

skills.name: check-godaddy
skills.description: Check if GoDaddy domain/hosting subscription payment is completed

parameters.expectedAmount: number — expected payment amount in USD

skills.name: check-canva
skills.description: Check if Canva Pro subscription payment is completed

parameters.expectedAmount: number — expected payment amount in USD

skills.name: check-all-subscriptions
skills.description: Run a full check on all subscriptions — Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva — and report combined status

skills.name: report-to-finance
skills.description: Send subscription check results to the parent finance agent for record-keeping

agents.name: sanity-check
agents.description: A background agent that validates code, configuration, and deployments for correctness. It checks syntax, lint rules, type safety, environment variables, and deployment readiness.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression (e.g. 1=1) to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: lint
skills.description: Runs lint checks on a given codebase and returns violations

skills.name: typecheck
skills.description: Runs type-checking (tsc, mypy, etc.) and returns type errors

skills.name: env-validate
skills.description: Checks that required environment variables are present and well-formed

skills.name: config-check
skills.description: Validates project configuration files (JSON, YAML, TOML) for syntax and schema

skills.name: deploy-readiness
skills.description: Checks if a project is ready for deployment
